title: The Science of Phototherapy
content: Phototherapy, or light therapy, has been used for over 100 years. LifeWave patches use advanced phototherapy to stimulate the body. When a patch is placed on the skin, it reflects specific wavelengths of light back into the body to stimulate a targeted biological effect, such as stem cell activation or pain relief.

title: 光波疗法的科学
content: 光波疗法（或称光疗）已被使用超过100年。LifeWave贴片使用先进的光波疗法来刺激身体。将贴片贴在皮肤上时，它会将特定波长的光反射回体内，从而刺激特定的生物效应，例如激活干细胞或缓解疼痛。

title: X39 Stem Cell Activation
content: The LifeWave X39 patch is clinically proven to elevate the GHK-Cu copper peptide, which is known to activate stem cells. Benefits include rapid pain relief, reduced inflammation, supports wound healing, energy and vitality, mental clarity, and enhanced sports performance. Key placement points include CV6 (under the belly button) or GV14 (base of the neck).

title: X39 干细胞激活
content: LifeWave X39贴片经临床验证可提升GHK-Cu蓝铜胜肽，已知其能激活干细胞。益处包括快速缓解疼痛、减少炎症、支持伤口愈合、提供能量与活力、让头脑清晰以及提升运动表现。主要贴片位置包括CV6（气海穴，肚脐下方）或GV14（大椎穴，颈部底部）。

title: David Schmidt and Corporate Info
content: LifeWave was founded by David Schmidt. With over 130 patents globally, David Schmidt has pioneered the technology behind LifeWave's phototherapy patches since 2004. The patches are backed by multiple clinical studies demonstrating their safety and efficacy.

title: David Schmidt 与公司简介
content: LifeWave 由 David Schmidt 创立。David Schmidt 在全球拥有超过130项专利，自2004年以来一直是LifeWave光波疗法贴片技术背后的先驱。这些贴片拥有多项临床研究的支持，证明了其安全性和有效性。

title: IceWave for Pain Management
content: IceWave patches are designed to provide rapid pain relief at the source. Utilizing the Clock/Cross method, one tan and one white patch are used to break the flow of pain in the body's bio-electrical system.

title: IceWave 疼痛管理贴片
content: IceWave 贴片旨在从源头快速缓解疼痛。利用钟表/十字形贴法，使用一张棕色贴片和一张白色贴片来打破身体生物电系统中的疼痛流动。

title: Aeon for Stress Relief
content: Y-Age Aeon is clinically proven to reduce stress in the body by promoting a deep state of relaxation and decreasing inflammation, which is vital for anti-aging. It balances the autonomic nervous system.

title: Aeon 抗压贴片
content: Y-Age Aeon 经临床验证能通过促进深度放松状态和减少炎症来减轻身体压力，这对抗衰老至关重要。它能平衡自主神经系统。

title: Brand Partner Program
content: The LifeWave Brand Partner program allows you to earn income by sharing LifeWave products. It uses a binary compensation plan rewarding volume generated by your team, retail profits, and direct bonuses.

title: 品牌合作伙伴计划
content: LifeWave品牌合作伙伴计划允许您通过分享LifeWave产品赚取收入。它使用双轨制奖金计划，奖励您的团队产生的积分奖励、零售利润以及直接推荐奖金。
